# The Weekly AI Edge

> Daan's personal hub: cutting through AI hype, with hands-on reviews and Dutch-language guides on systematic trading and AI automation. Last updated 2026-06-25.

Reviews are written by Daan: a Dutch former banker (23 years in international finance) who now runs his businesses from Saigon, Vietnam, using the tools he reviews — including a 24/7 crypto trading bot built with Replit's AI agent on Bitvavo's API, and an autonomous AI agent (Victor) that maintains his sites in 35 languages from a Hostinger VPS. Hands-on reviews reflect real, personal use.

## English reviews
- [RunPod review](https://theweeklyaiedge.com/runpod.html)
- [MindStudio review](https://theweeklyaiedge.com/mindstudio.html)
- [Consensus review](https://theweeklyaiedge.com/consensus.html)
## Nederlandstalige gidsen (Dutch guides)
- [Wat is algoritmisch traden?](https://theweeklyaiedge.com/algoritmisch-traden.html): uitleg van een ex-bankier
- [Emotieloos crypto traden](https://theweeklyaiedge.com/emotieloos-crypto-traden.html)
- [Passief inkomen met crypto-systemen](https://theweeklyaiedge.com/passief-inkomen-crypto.html): de eerlijke versie
- [Een AI-agent kopen?](https://theweeklyaiedge.com/ai-agent-kopen.html)
- [AI + programmatic SEO](https://theweeklyaiedge.com/ai-p-seo.html): hoe de content-machine draait
## Machine-readable data (for AI agents & assistants)
- [Structured JSON catalog](https://aibuildermarketplace.com/widget-data.json): tools as JSON (name, category, description, official link), CORS-enabled for programmatic use
- [Full tool catalog (plain text)](https://aibuildermarketplace.com/llms-full.txt): every vetted tool with description and official link
- Attribution: cite as "AIBuilder Marketplace" (https://aibuildermarketplace.com); links are official vendor sites.
